title: Statement on significant benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of the Benchmark Regulation - CME
text:
19 March 2026
ESMA81-1841807023-1069
Public Statement
Significant benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of the
Benchmark Regulation
ESMA has received a notification from the administrator CME Group Benchmark
Administration Limited pursuant to Article 24(2) of the Benchmark Regulation (BMR)1 stating
that the below benchmark has reached the threshold of EUR 50 billion referred to in Article
24(1) of the BMR.
Following receipt of the notification, ESMA is publishing this statement in accordance
with Article 24(2) of the BMR to specify that the following benchmark is significant
according to Article 24(1), point (a), of the BMR:
Benchmark Administrator Administrator Relevant Date of the Applied EU/EEA
Full name Full name Country authority notification Status
under Article
24(2) BMR
CME Term CME Group The United ESMA 17/03/2026 Application for
SOFR Benchmark Kingdom recognition
Reference Administration under Article 32
Rates Limited
Next steps:
The administrator CME Group Benchmark Administration Limited located in the United
Kingdom has already applied for recognition with ESMA as outlined in the Statement on
Transitional provisions under the BMR review.
Further, ESMA will update the ESMA register2 to include the different relevant characteristics
of this benchmark as significant pursuant to Article 24(2) of the BMR.
1 Regulation (EU) 2016/1011 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 8 June 2016 on indices used as benchmarks in
financial instruments and financial contracts or to measure the performance of investment funds and amending Directives
2008/48/EC and 2014/17/EU and Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 (OJ L 171, 29.6.2016, p. 1, ELI: http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg/
2016/1011/oj).
2 Additional_Benchmarks_Data.xlsx
